changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE gdpr_organization_status ( id serial, organization_id integer NOT NULL, compliance double precision, compliance_metric double precision DEFAULT NULL, files_number double precision DEFAULT NULL, articles_processed double precision DEFAULT NULL, articles_number double precision DEFAULT NULL, comments text, CONSTRAINT pk_gdpr_organization_status PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_gdpr_organization_status_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE ); CREATE INDEX i_gdpr_organization_status_to_organization ON gdpr_organization_status (organization_id);
